name: Can I sue my employer directly for intentional asbestos exposure in Millcreek?
description: Only if intentional or uninsured; comp usually exclusive.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer directly for intentional asbestos exposure in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Only if intentional or uninsured; comp usually exclusive.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Rarely; exclusive remedy bars suits unless intentional injury or no insurance.[1] Key factors: (1) Deliberate harm by officers; (2) Removing guards knowingly; (3) No comp coverage exposes them.[1] Prove intent hard; stick to comp usually.[1] Third-party suits easier for negligence.[1]
